features: SAFE AND EASY: Girls, tweens, and adults will have a blast applying these pretty colors to their nails. The Press-on Nails are designed for different nail sizes. They are made of quality material which can last weeks, is durable and breathable, and non-toxic and harmless.

EASY TO APPLY: The 96 pieces of Press-on Nails in our Kit are pre-glued and have adhesive at the back making application super easy. First, remove moisture and oil from the original nails. Then, choose the right size from our Kit to stick on the nails. Press for 5 seconds. If the size is too large, the option to trim and polish them exists.

UNLEASH HER CREATIVITY: With so many Press-on Nail options, your little one can mix and match designs. She'll create a masterpiece on her nails in no time. Our false nails are great for girls or women with short and small fingernails. They are suitable for nail salons and DIY nail art at home. Multiple cute patterns are available. Have fun and be bold with our glitter and metallic Press-on Nails!

MORE FUN FOR EVERYONE: Applying our Press-on Nails is a fun activity that your little one can indulge in with her friends at Birthdays, Sleepovers, Makeovers, and more! They are great Party Favors, Stocking Stuffers, School Rewards and giveaways for other multi-occasions. You can use them as you pamper yourself too whether with a Self-Care routine, on Ladies‚Äô Night Outs, Vacations, and at other times!

BRING THE SALON TO HER LIVING ROOM: With all the tools your little one needs for fun nail accessorizing in this Set, who needs a salon? They stick very well and are easily removable without causing any pain or harm.
